strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, with proven capability to work across multiple platforms and languages
Founded and maintained GISCollective since 2016, demonstrating entrepreneurial experience and ability to ship products used in production by real organizations
Recent hands-on work with AI infrastructure and agent frameworks (MCP) at re:cinq shows engagement with emerging AI technologies
concerns: No formal AI/ML education (Master's/PhD preferred) and limited demonstrated expertise in artificial intelligence beyond recent infrastructure work
Lacks evidence of building AI-powered products or platforms—the role explicitly requires 'demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
Current Staff role at re:cinq is only 1 year old, making it difficult to assess strategic AI knowledge, influence, or ability to lead in this domain

key_factors.factor: No recognized AI expertise or products
20 years broad technical foundation and founder track record
Very recent AI exposure too nascent for strategy role

response.justification: The candidate exceeds baseline experience requirements with 20 years of software engineering and demonstrates entrepreneurial capability. However, this role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' The resume shows recent exposure to AI infrastructure but no evidence of AI product development, machine learning expertise, or strategic AI knowledge. This position demands an AI strategist and recognized specialist; the candidate is a generalist engineer with limited, recent AI exposure.
